title: Move time button to below Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone controls

requirements.text: In InteractiveGlobe.tsx, locate the time button that currently lives in the fixed right bottom panel and render a duplicate of it in the left-side controls panel, positioned directly below the Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone toggle controls. The duplicated button must be fully functional (same onClick handler, same state bindings) and visually consistent with the existing controls in that area.

quotes: How about you try moving the time button first ?
below day/night terminator and twilight zone

acceptanceCriteria: The time button appears in the left-side controls panel, directly below the Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone controls.
Clicking the time button in its new position behaves identically to clicking it in the original right bottom panel (same state change, same visual feedback).
The time button still exists in the right bottom panel (it is not removed in this step — only moved/duplicated as the first incremental step).
No existing controls in the left-side panel are displaced or broken by the addition.
The new button styling is consistent with the surrounding controls.

constraints: Only move the time button in this build step — do NOT move or remove the Real/Hourly/Yearly toggles yet.
Do NOT remove the right bottom panel in this step.
Do not alter backend logic or data models.
Do not modify any file listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Moving the Real/Hourly/Yearly toggles (deferred to a future step).
Removing the right bottom panel (deferred until all controls are successfully moved).
Any changes to backend Motoko code.
Redesigning or restyling the existing controls panel.
